channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐ…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ
item.content:encoded:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ

item.title: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State…
item.author: MeidasTouch (@meidastouch.com)
item.description: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”
item.content:encoded: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”

item.title: I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally so…
item.author: New York Attorney General Letitia James (@newyorkstateag.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.
item.content:encoded:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.

item.title: 特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌で…
item.author: 西崎憲 (@kennishizaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com
item.content:encoded:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com

item.title: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままど…
item.author: GrimoireBook (@grimoirebook.bsky.social)
item.description: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww
item.content:encoded: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww

item.title: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went publi…
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went public on the Nasdaq today at a valuation of about $1.9 billion.
item.content:encoded: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went public on the Nasdaq today at a valuation of about $1.9 billion.

item.title: Stylish sandals are a crucial part of any warm-weather wardr…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Stylish sandals are a crucial part of any warm-weather wardrobe. But the wrong pair can easily spoil your fun in the sun (think blistered toes, broken straps, aching feet). Wirecutter scoured beaches, boardwalks, and beyond to find 10 terrific options. nyti.ms/4wfIsSY
item.content:encoded: Stylish sandals are a crucial part of any warm-weather wardrobe. But the wrong pair can easily spoil your fun in the sun (think blistered toes, broken straps, aching feet). Wirecutter scoured beaches, boardwalks, and beyond to find 10 terrific options. nyti.ms/4wfIsSY

item.title: After President Donald Trump disclosed $1.4 billion in crypt…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description:
After President Donald Trump disclosed $1.4 billion in crypto-related revenue, scrutiny grew over how many investors who bought his $TRUMP meme coin ended up losing money. CNN's David Goldman reports.

Read more: https://cnn.it/4vEkyRj
item.content:encoded:
After President Donald Trump disclosed $1.4 billion in crypto-related revenue, scrutiny grew over how many investors who bought his $TRUMP meme coin ended up losing money. CNN's David Goldman reports.

Read more: https://cnn.it/4vEkyRj

item.title: 【今日の天気】 3日(金)は梅雨前線が南下し、活動が弱くなる見込みです。中国・四国から東海にかけては梅雨の中休みで、気温…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日の天気】
3日(金)は梅雨前線が南下し、活動が弱くなる見込みです。中国・四国から東海にかけては梅雨の中休みで、気温が30℃前後まで上がる予想です。
関東甲信や東北は大気の状態が不安定で、雷を伴った強い雨の降る可能性があります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【今日の天気】
3日(金)は梅雨前線が南下し、活動が弱くなる見込みです。中国・四国から東海にかけては梅雨の中休みで、気温が30℃前後まで上がる予想です。
関東甲信や東北は大気の状態が不安定で、雷を伴った強い雨の降る可能性があります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: Colorado has grown quickly and become younger, but political…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Colorado has grown quickly and become younger, but political analysts largely attribute the collapse of Republicans there to the rise of MAGA. on.wsj.com/4aBt2Ai
item.content:encoded: Colorado has grown quickly and become younger, but political analysts largely attribute the collapse of Republicans there to the rise of MAGA. on.wsj.com/4aBt2Ai

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, “…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, “as the image of the good-looking, wholesome, all-American couple, are harder than ever to relate to,” Alice Bolin writes in a guest essay. “No one roots for the overdog.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, “as the image of the good-looking, wholesome, all-American couple, are harder than ever to relate to,” Alice Bolin writes in a guest essay. “No one roots for the overdog.”

item.title: Pope Leo XIV will mark the 250th anniversary of US independe…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Pope Leo XIV will mark the 250th anniversary of US independence by highlighting the plight of migrants, an area of continuing tension between the papacy and the Trump administration, on a visit to the southern Italian island of Lampedusa. https://cnn.it/4y36H8J
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo XIV will mark the 250th anniversary of US independence by highlighting the plight of migrants, an area of continuing tension between the papacy and the Trump administration, on a visit to the southern Italian island of Lampedusa. https://cnn.it/4y36H8J

item.title: In this episode you'll learn ・What DEVO meant by "de-evolut…
item.author: mmr (@mmr3cords.bsky.social)
item.description:
In this episode you'll learn

・What DEVO meant by "de-evolution"
・The surprising history of the Energy Dome
・How satire shaped DEVO's music and visual identity
・Why DEVO predicted many aspects of today's digital society

#DEVO
#EnergyDome
#NewWave

youtu.be/Y9oot4gs-WY
item.content:encoded:
In this episode you'll learn

・What DEVO meant by "de-evolution"
・The surprising history of the Energy Dome
・How satire shaped DEVO's music and visual identity
・Why DEVO predicted many aspects of today's digital society

#DEVO
#EnergyDome
#NewWave

youtu.be/Y9oot4gs-WY

item.title: Someone has to say it. The amount of racism directed at Wo…
item.author: Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan (@london.gov.uk)
item.description:
Someone has to say it.

The amount of racism directed at World Cup players - including in the England squad - online is out of control.
item.content:encoded:
Someone has to say it.

The amount of racism directed at World Cup players - including in the England squad - online is out of control.

item.title: #China has turned an empty stretch of desert into one of the…
item.author: alexvonwitzleben.bsky.social (@alexvonwitzleben.bsky.social)
item.description: #China has turned an empty stretch of desert into one of the most productive solar sites on the planet. The Tengger Desert Solar Park in Ningxia spans roughly 43 square kilometers and generates over 1.5GW, making it one of the largest single solar installations in the world #ActOnClimate #SolarPower
item.content:encoded: #China has turned an empty stretch of desert into one of the most productive solar sites on the planet. The Tengger Desert Solar Park in Ningxia spans roughly 43 square kilometers and generates over 1.5GW, making it one of the largest single solar installations in the world #ActOnClimate #SolarPower

item.title: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line …
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line behind their turtle friend. Not sure what the line is even for, but man is it moving slow. 12/10 for all (IG: yokokikuchi_ks)
item.content:encoded: This is Hina, Sasha, Momo, and Kikko. They just got in line behind their turtle friend. Not sure what the line is even for, but man is it moving slow. 12/10 for all (IG: yokokikuchi_ks)

item.title: The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.
item.content:encoded:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.
